title: frangula granulosa
intro: Frangula granulosa, also known as buckthorn or alder buckthorn, is a shrub native to Eastern Asia and is part of the Rhamnaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its high concentration of anthraquinones, which have laxative and purgative effects. The health benefits of Frangula granulosa include its ability to support digestive health, relieve constipation, and potentially aid in weight loss. Frangula granulosa can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used in conjunction with other herbal remedies to promote overall well-being.
